parameters.name: partner_key
parameters.description: Authentication key for each individual partner.

parameters.name: rec_trade_id
parameters.description: Identifier for the transaction being refunded.

parameters.name: bank_refund_id
parameters.description: Self-defined refund record identifier (half-shaped English number, must be unique). Forwarded if supported by acquirer.

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: Only required for partial refund. Amount must include two decimal places (except TWD), e.g. 100 = $1.00. Instalment and T2P transactions do not support partial refunds.

parameters.name: additional_data
parameters.description: Data encrypted and decrypted for other customization requirements.

parameters.name: merchandise_details
parameters.description: Item amount or points excluded from redeems. Only supported by some e-payments.

request.description: JSON body. Header x-api-key. Refund a transaction (reverses capture+authorization; amount only for partial refund)

responses.description: Refund result JSON; status=0 indicates success. HTTP status not stated by source (200 assumed).
